name: How do I prove my injury is permanent and get a settlement?

mainEntity.name: How do I prove my injury is permanent and get a settlement?

acceptedAnswer.text: You prove permanent disability through a medical impairment rating once you reach Maximum Medical Improvement. This rating determines your eligibility for a settlement based on the percentage of permanent loss of function.
